hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ti = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | ConvertFrom-Json -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $cmd = if ($ti) { $ti.command } else { '' }; if ($cmd -match 'live_trader') { Write-Output 'LIVE_TRADING_WARNING: live_trader.py will execute REAL trades with REAL capital. Confirm the user has explicitly approved this action for this session.'; exit 1 }"

powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ti = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | ConvertFrom-Json -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $cmd = if ($ti) { $ti.command } else { '' }; if ($cmd -match '\.py$' -or $cmd -match 'python ') { $ec = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_RESPONSE | ConvertFrom-Json -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $out = if ($ec) { $ec.output } else { '' }; if ($out -match 'Traceback|Error:|Exception:') { Write-Output 'PYTHON_ERROR_DETECTED: The script raised an exception. Review the traceback above before proceeding.' } }"

powershell -NoProfile -Command "Write-Output ''; Write-Output '--- Session end ---'; $base = 'C:\Users\Bryant Effendi\OneDrive - City University of Hong Kong - Student\Desktop\Algoritmic Trading Project'; $changed = git -C $base status --short 2>$null; if ($changed) { Write-Output 'Changed files:'; Write-Output $changed } else { Write-Output 'No uncommitted changes.' }"
